daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving main character energy today, Sag. The universe is basically handing you permission to be unapologetically yourself. Lean into that confidence—people can feel it.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a softness in your energy that's magnetic rn. If you've been waiting for the right moment to be vulnerable with someone, today's got your back.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. Don't sleep on that impulse to pitch something unconventional or take a fresh approach. Your team's probably ready to hear what you've got.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and sunlight—nothing intense, just something that feels good. Trust that intuition about what your energy actually needs vs what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about authenticity, Sag. The cosmos is nudging you to show up as your real self, even when it's messy. Trust the unfolding—magic happens when you stop performing.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing your vibe shift. Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a moment to be vulnerable without overthinking it. Real connection thrives on honest words, not perfect ones.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are worth listening to rn. Don't wait for permission to pitch that idea or take a different approach. The energy supports bold moves grounded in genuine passion, not ego.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence, not perfection. Move in ways that feel good, rest without guilt, and pay attention to what actually energizes you versus what you think should. That's the real wellness.
